LOWRISK STEADY ——_—_—_—_—————————— ry Real Estate Residential, Commercial Land - REIT, Physical property investment for rental yield or capital appreciation. ocr_text: Basics Module 02 What is a Stock Market? MAJOR EXCHANGES IN INDIA Bombay Stock Exchange Established 1875 Sensex (30 Stocks) “A platform where investors buy and sell shares of public companies.” National Stock Exchange Established 1992 Nifty 50 (50 Stocks) © Purpose: Channel savings to businesses & generate wealth & Electronic Platform Not a physical ‘mandi’. Markets operate electronically, accessible from anywhere. & ~=—- Regulated Access HOW IT WORKS Investors cannot trade directly; access is only through SEBI-registered stock brokers. Exchange 2 (nse/ese) Platform _ Inflation Beating You Historically, equity markets have provided returns that outperform inflation over the long run.

Investor Protection ‘Safeguards the interests of retail investors by enforcing strict disclosure norms for companies. ocr_text: Broker, Trading Account & Bank Linkage The infrastructure that powers your trades a aw 3 Payin//Pay out Bank Account Your personal savings account. The source of money for investing, ‘One-to-One Linkage fa Trading Account Provided by your Stock Broker. The interface to place Buy/Sell orders # Order Execution & TRADING INFRASTRUCTURE & Stock Exchange NSE or BSE. Where buyers and sellers are matched electronically. For security, your trading account is linked to a specific primary bank account. Money can only flow between these pre-linked accounts. The Broker's Role ‘The broker acts as the gateway. You cannot go to the Exchange (NSE/BSE) directly. The broker charges a fee (brokerage) for facilitating this access.

ocr_text: Depository, DEMAT Account & DP Where and how your shares are stored digitally Investor You, the beneficial owner of the shares. & Account Opening Depository Participant (DP) Your agent (Broker/Bank). You interact with the DP, not the depository directly. Dematerialization (DEMAT) @&s TRADING INFRASTRUCTURE Depositories NSDL & CDSL. The central “digital vaults” holding all electronic shares. The process of converting physical share certificates into electronic format. A DEMAT account is like @ bank account, but for holding shares instead of cash. Indirect Access Model Investors cannot open an account directly with NSDL or CDSL. They must go through a registered agent called a Depository Participant (DP), similar to how you use a bank branch to access the central banking system.

ocr_text: Market Jargons Decoding the essential language of the stock market ®t Bull Market A market condition where share prices are rising or are expected to rise. It symbolizes optimism and investor confidence. 9 OPTIMISTIC ———n Face Value The original cost of the stock listed on the certificate (e.g, 210). Used to calculate dividends and stock splits. Nominal ——————————— ‘“s Bear Market ‘A market condition where prices are falling significantly. It symbolizes pessimism, selling pressure, and lack of confidence. PESSIMISTIC A TERMINOLOGY en © Market Trend The general direction in which the market is moving over a period of time. © Uptrend (Higher Highs) ‘© Downtrend (Lower Lows) © Sideways (Range bound) 52-Week High / Low The highest and lowest price at which a stock has traded during the previous 52 weeks (I year). By 52.w tigh: €210 ‘CURRENT STATUS Trading near High
